seo.title: Products | Setu Technology
seo.description: Explore Setu Technology's products — Setu Dine and Setu Queue for restaurants are live today, with Setu Retail and Setu Clinic coming soon.

hero.headline: One company, building for every industry
hero.subheadline: We started with restaurants. Here's what's live today, and what's coming next.

products.name: Setu Dine
products.headline: Restaurant management, done right
products.description: Billing, kitchen workflow, table management, multi-outlet dashboards, customer management, coupons and a built-in tax engine — everything a restaurant needs to run smoothly, from a single outlet to a full chain.

products.name: Setu Queue
products.headline: QSR counter service, sorted
products.description: Counter billing, token management, kitchen routing and customer pickup display — built for quick service restaurants and food courts.

products.name: Setu Retail
products.headline: Retail store management, coming soon
products.description: Inventory tracking, billing and store operations built for retail businesses across the globe.

products.name: Setu for your business
products.headline: Building for your industry next
products.description: If you don't see your industry yet, tell us what you run. We're building Setu for every kind of business, one industry at a time.
